change_description: [growth] Add newsletter signup + endpoint in lite SPA
outcome: Blocked: committed locally; CF Pages project options-ranker missing and optionsranker.io DNS unresolved

change_description: [features] Add Recent Tickers chip strip on landing page. Saves last 8 searched tickers to localStorage (optionsranker_recent_tickers) and renders clickable chips below the search box. Click to re-analyze. Includes clear button. Pure client-side, no API.
metric_impact: Return visitor convenience; encourages multi-ticker sessions
outcome: Blocked: committed locally; CF Pages project options-ranker still missing (confirmed via wrangler deploy attempt at 14:16)

change_description: Promote tournament run-1 winner weights to lite SPA scoreStrategy: rr 20→15, iv 25→35, liq 10→8, ba 10→7; kept prob=20 and ev=15. Added ivRank<10 → 50 cold-start floor. Updated components.max badges accordingly. Basis: agent_1 (Healthcare, IV-heavy) finished +$4,658 vs control -$32,188 across 8 paper-trading days.
metric_impact: $37K P&L gap between winner and control weights over 8 days
outcome: Success (local); deploy blocked pending CF project name clarification

change_description: [growth] Upgraded the free-tier upgrade modal to show ticker-specific locked strategy counts, a free-vs-pro comparison, and corrected locked-card copy to match the actual remaining strategies. Verified with lite feature tests and deployed to the Cloudflare Pages optionsranker project preview.
metric_impact: Higher upgrade-modal CTR by making the paywall specific to the user’s searched ticker instead of a generic subscription pitch.

change_description: [watchlist] Prioritize landing-page watchlist entries by IV Rank and show IV heat badges plus summary counts for hot/elevated/calm setups.
metric_impact: Faster triage of saved tickers by surfacing the highest-volatility opportunities first in the lite SPA.

change_description: [watchlist] Added strategy-tilt badges plus bullish/bearish/neutral summary counts to the lite landing-page watchlist. Deployed to Cloudflare Pages optionsranker preview and verified on optionsranker.pages.dev path because the custom domain DNS issue remains unresolved.
metric_impact: Saved tickers now show whether the current top setup leans bullish, bearish, or neutral before the user reopens analysis.

change_description: [scanner] Added full-platform market scanner, AEROC ranking mode, shared scanner types/constants, and a Lite top-options content page.
metric_impact: Gives users a cross-sector discovery surface plus a debit-focused ranking model; build passed, targeted ranking tests passed 49/49, and Lite tests passed 113/113.

change_description: [revenue] Added a best-next-step CTA card that moves top-options readers into live rankings or the top-play gate with campaign query tags.
metric_impact: Improves path from educational options content into scanner/ranking engagement and paid strategy evaluation; deployed to Cloudflare Pages and verified on optionsranker.pages.dev because the custom domain DNS issue remains unresolved.
